created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the key was created.

id.description: The unique identifier (UUID) of the API key record.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the key is currently active and can be used for authentication.

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to this key.

prefix.description: The environment prefix for the key.

active.description: Indicates whether the network should be active immediately upon creation.

block_lag.description: Delay in blocks between the node and the tip.

decimals.description: Number of decimal places for the native currency.

last_processed_block.description: The starting block number for the indexer. Use 0 to start from the current tip.

logo_url.description: Optional URL pointing to the network's logo icon.

name.description: Unique canonical identifier for the new network.

required_confirmations.description: Number of blocks required to consider a transaction fully confirmed.

rpc_urls.description: List of RPC endpoint URLs used to interact with the network.

safe_lag.description: Minimum block depth required to trust empty log responses from RPC (prevents false-empty logs)

tokens.description: Initial list of tokens (e.g., ERC20) to track on this network.

xpub.description: Extended public key used to derive HD wallet addresses.

native_symbol.description: The native currency symbol of the network.

amount.description: The exact amount of the asset expected to be paid.

duration.description: Duration in seconds before the invoice expires (default is 900 seconds / 15 minutes).

permissions.description: List of permissions granted to this key. Publishable keys (`pk_live`) can only have `public_read`.

prefix.description: The environment prefix for the key (secret or publishable).

key_id.description: The UUID of the generated key record.

raw_key.description: The raw secret API key. **Store this securely, it will not be shown again.**

code.description: A short code indicating the specific error.

message.description: A human-readable message providing more details about the error.

param.description: The parameter that caused the error, if applicable.

error.description: The error object containing details about the failure.

address.description: The unique cryptocurrency address generated for this invoice.

address_index.description: Internal index used for HD wallet address derivation.

amount_raw.description: Raw target amount in minimal indivisible units (e.g., Wei). Passed as a string to prevent precision loss.

paid.description: Human-readable amount that has been paid so far.

paid_raw.description: Raw paid amount in minimal units. Passed as a string.

oneOf.description: Fired immediately when a transaction to the invoice address is detected on the network (0 confirmations).

data.description: Fired immediately when a transaction to the invoice address is detected on the network (0 confirmations).

oneOf.description: Fired when a transaction reaches the required number of confirmations.

data.description: Fired when a transaction reaches the required number of confirmations.

oneOf.description: Fired when the invoice is fully paid (total confirmed payments >= target amount).

data.description: Fired when the invoice is fully paid (total confirmed payments >= target amount).

oneOf.description: Fired when the invoice's time-to-live expires before being fully paid.

data.description: Fired when the invoice's time-to-live expires before being fully paid.

oneOf.description: Fired when the invoice is manually cancelled via the API.

data.description: Fired when the invoice is manually cancelled via the API.

WebhookEventSchema.title: WebhookEvent
WebhookEventSchema.description: The specific event payload that will be sent to the webhook URL.

attempts.description: The current number of delivery attempts made.

invoice_id.description: The ID of the invoice that triggered this webhook.

max_retries.description: The maximum number of retries allowed before permanently failing.

next_retry.description: Timestamp indicating when the next delivery attempt will occur (if pending/processing).

url.description: The destination URL where the webhook payload is sent.

bearer_auth.description: Authenticate requests using your API key. Prefix it with `Bearer `, e.g., `Bearer sk_live_123`
